problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
hypothesis: Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization may resolve How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
